[] [StaticText] [An der ETH studieren]
goto [http://ethz.ch]
It seems there has been a mistake as the current webpage does not provide the necessary information to fulfill the objective. The current webpage is the German homepage of ETH Zurich, a university in Switzerland, and does not relate to finding trucks in Ohio. 

To achieve the objective, we need to navigate to a website where trucks are listed for sale, preferably a marketplace that allows filtering by location (Ohio) and color (white). 

First, I will navigate to the homepage where I can access a list of websites that might have listings for trucks. 

In summary, the next action I will perform is ```goto [http://homepage.com]```
